overview: Cumulative is a behavioral-science-driven social accountability PWA that uses the WOOP framework to help users build lasting habits through goal setting, daily check-ins, and accountability partner support.
features: WOOP Goal Builder — multi-step wizard (Wish, Outcome, Obstacle, If-Then Plan)
Daily check-in dashboard with one-tap success and swipe-to-skip gestures
Accountability partner connections with mutual consent flow
Partner Feed with High-Five social interactions
Analytics with 30-day trend chart and streak tracking
Tier-based goal limits (Free: 3, Plus: 10, Power: 25) with Admin override
Fully installable PWA with Web App Manifest and Service Worker
Neumorphic dark UI with glowing accent colors and tactile components
